name: Mockaroo
description: Mockaroo — Online test data generator creating realistic CSV, JSON, and SQL datasets with customizable schema definitions.

seo.title: Mockaroo — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Mockaroo: Mockaroo — Online test data generator creating realistic CSV, JSON, and SQL datasets with customizable schema definitions.

when_to_use: Generate realistic CSV/JSON/SQL test datasets online
Custom schema with 180+ realistic data types
API endpoint for dynamic test data generation in CI
Seed databases with production-like relational data

pros: Generates realistic CSV, JSON, SQL quickly
Free tier covers many small needs
cons: Data is random, not referentially consistent
Privacy concerns sending schemas to SaaS
Paid tiers needed for bigger volumes
Not a full test data management platform
review.verdict: Perfect for one-off realistic test datasets, do not mistake it for a TDM platform.
review.best_for: Engineers and analysts needing quick, realistic sample data for prototypes
review.not_for: Teams needing compliant, referentially-correct production-like datasets
